description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking, remove promptly5..Line dry inside-out in shade6. Warm iron only7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFittingComfortGet real, get stylish in this white t-shirt from mr. men. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee wicks away sweat and keeps you comfortable and dry while your shirt wears your mind, asking after everyone’s well-being in an absolutely cool way. Pair it with jeans or chinos and comfortable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the international collection at myntra to complete your fashion statement.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
